news.title:
Cement stocks fell up to 7% due to margin concerns from rising crude oil prices.
Ramco dropped 7% to ₹1,014.6; JK 6% to ₹5,100; UltraTech 5% to ₹11,350.4; India Cements 5% to ₹362.9.
news.summary:
Cement stocks fell up to 7% due to margin concerns from rising crude oil prices.
Ramco dropped 7% to ₹1,014.6; JK 6% to ₹5,100; UltraTech 5% to ₹11,350.4; India Cements 5% to ₹362.9.

news.title:
ONGC detected unusual bids of exactly ₹7,000/tonne in a 2018 cement tender.
India Cements responded wryly to ONGC's query on the bidding anomaly.
news.summary:
ONGC detected unusual bids of exactly ₹7,000/tonne in a 2018 cement tender.
India Cements responded wryly to ONGC's query on the bidding anomaly.

news.title:
India Cements colluded on ONGC cement tender bids in 2017-18, antitrust probe finds.
Document reveals bid collusion details in exclusive findings.
news.summary:
India Cements colluded on ONGC cement tender bids in 2017-18, antitrust probe finds.
Document reveals bid collusion details in exclusive findings.

news.title:
India antitrust probe implicates top executives of Dalmia Cement, Shree Digvijay, and India Cements for antitrust breaches.
Document reveals liability for executives; investigation details disclosed as of March 9, 2026.
news.summary:
India antitrust probe implicates top executives of Dalmia Cement, Shree Digvijay, and India Cements for antitrust breaches.
Document reveals liability for executives; investigation details disclosed as of March 9, 2026.

news.title:
JSW Energy and Godrej Consumer Products shares plunged 10% post-Q3 results, while India Cements rose 5%.
JSW Energy's profit grew 150% YoY, but missed estimates; Godrej Consumer's net profit declined; India Cements showed operational improvements.
news.summary:
JSW Energy and Godrej Consumer Products shares plunged 10% post-Q3 results, while India Cements rose 5%.
JSW Energy's profit grew 150% YoY, but missed estimates; Godrej Consumer's net profit declined; India Cements showed operational improvements.

news.title:
India Cements announced the outcome of its earnings call for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
The audio recording of the earnings call is available on the company's website.
news.summary:
India Cements announced the outcome of its earnings call for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
The audio recording of the earnings call is available on the company's website.

news.title: India Cements plans Rs 2,000 Cr capex to reach 17.55 MT capacity by FY27.
news.summary: India Cements plans Rs 2,000 Cr capex to reach 17.55 MT capacity by FY27.

news.title:
India Cements' cement sales grew 25% YoY to 2.59M tons; capacity utilization rose 11% YoY to 69%.
Net cement price fell 2.4% QoQ; operating EBITDA per ton dropped from ₹330 to ₹299; PAT at ₹6 crore.
news.summary:
India Cements' cement sales grew 25% YoY to 2.59M tons; capacity utilization rose 11% YoY to 69%.
Net cement price fell 2.4% QoQ; operating EBITDA per ton dropped from ₹330 to ₹299; PAT at ₹6 crore.

news.title:
India Cements reported Q3 EBITDA gain of 795M vs loss of 1.9B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin for India Cements stands at 7.1%.
news.summary:
India Cements reported Q3 EBITDA gain of 795M vs loss of 1.9B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin for India Cements stands at 7.1%.

news.title:
India Cements faces GST demand orders for FY 2021-22 over excess ITC claims.
Company plans to contest and anticipates no significant financial impact.
news.summary:
India Cements faces GST demand orders for FY 2021-22 over excess ITC claims.
Company plans to contest and anticipates no significant financial impact.

news.title:
India Cements clarified spurt in trading volume, citing compliance with SEBI (LODR) norms.
The company stated no undisclosed information or announcements affecting price/volume.
news.summary:
India Cements clarified spurt in trading volume, citing compliance with SEBI (LODR) norms.
The company stated no undisclosed information or announcements affecting price/volume.

news.title:
IRFC secures $300M ECB loan; Indigo faces ₹117.5 crore tax penalty.
India Cements sells stake in PT Adcoal; Canara Bank raises ₹3,500 crore via bonds.
news.summary:
IRFC secures $300M ECB loan; Indigo faces ₹117.5 crore tax penalty.
India Cements sells stake in PT Adcoal; Canara Bank raises ₹3,500 crore via bonds.

news.title:
India Cements Ltd's subsidiaries sold their investment in PT Adcoal Energindo, Indonesia.
The sale is not a related party transaction and will conclude within six months.
news.summary:
India Cements Ltd's subsidiaries sold their investment in PT Adcoal Energindo, Indonesia.
The sale is not a related party transaction and will conclude within six months.

news.title:
India Cements Ltd's board will meet on 23rd Jan 2026 to approve Q3 and nine-month financial results.
Trading window for insiders and relatives is closed from 1st Jan to 25th Jan 2026.
news.summary:
India Cements Ltd's board will meet on 23rd Jan 2026 to approve Q3 and nine-month financial results.
Trading window for insiders and relatives is closed from 1st Jan to 25th Jan 2026.

news.title:
India Cements faces market evaluation revision due to financial and technical changes.
The update reflects shifting views on valuation, risks, and market momentum in cement sector.
news.summary:
India Cements faces market evaluation revision due to financial and technical changes.
The update reflects shifting views on valuation, risks, and market momentum in cement sector.

news.title:
Shetron's net profit fell 4.6% to Rs 1.05 cr in Sep 2025 quarter.
Sales increased by 4.3% to Rs 60.41 cr compared to Sep 2024.
news.summary:
Shetron's net profit fell 4.6% to Rs 1.05 cr in Sep 2025 quarter.

news.title:
India Cements Ltd's Q2 FY26 earnings call revealed financial results and operational details.
Highlights include volume growth, brand transitions, expansion plans, costs, capacity utilization, and demand outlook.
news.summary:
India Cements Ltd's Q2 FY26 earnings call revealed financial results and operational details.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank surges 7%, DCB Bank rises 9% post Q2 results; earnings season pauses due to Diwali.

news.title:
India Cements aims for operational turnaround via capacity expansion, efficiency upgrades, and debottlenecking by FY27.
The company targets restored profitability and strengthened market share through these initiatives.
